trigger.observed: The dx=0.02 versus dx=0.01 held-out prediction RMS delta was 2.9602 um, larger than the dx=0.01 held-out RMSE of 2.7851 um.
trigger.decision: The primary result is not grid-closed; run one finer level before interpreting agreement with experiment.

decision_rule.grid_closed_if: fine-vs-primary held-out prediction RMS delta <= primary-vs-coarse delta / 2
